title: Full Stack Developer (VueJs, Nuxt.js & C#)
description: Pozisyon Hakkında Yüksek trafikli sistemlerimizde uçtan uca mimari sorumluluk alacak, kod kalitesini standartların üzerine taşıyacak ve ölçeklenebilir mikroservis ekosistemimize liderlik edecek bir Full stack Developer arıyoruz. Ne Yapacaksınız Event-driven mimariye uygun, yüksek performanslı Node.js servisleri tasarlamak ve implemente etmekVue.js 3 ve TypeScript kullanarak, reusable komponent kütüphaneleri ve performans odaklı ön yüzler geliştirmekFirebase ve PostgreSQL veritabanı katmanlarında query optimizasyonu ve veri modellemesi yapmak Aradığımız Profil Node.js runtime ve asenkron programlama konusunda derinlemesine uzmanlıkModern frontend ekosistemine (State management, Composition API, SSR) hakimiyetDocker, Kubernetes ve CI/CD süreçlerinde aktif tecrübeVue.js ve Nuxt.js konusunda uzmanlık.Net teknolojisi C# ta yazılım geliştirmişMS SQL ile çalışmış Tercih Sebebi Microservices mimarisi ve Docker/Kubernetes konteynerizasyon süreçlerinde deneyimBirim test (Unit Test) ve entegrasyon testleri (Jest, Cypress) yazma disiplinine sahip olmakTeknik literatürü takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisiAçık kaynak projelere katkı sağlamış olmak veya aktif bir GitHub portfolyosuAgile ve Scrum metodolojilerine aşinalıkClean Code konseptlerinin uygulanması ve kaynak kod iyileştirme/refactoring konusunda uzmanlıkBootstrap, HTML ve CSS deneyimi

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE As a rapidly growing company, Jotform is seeking a Senior PHP Developer in our İzmir office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Teknopark İzmir. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Frontend Developer - Vue.js (Hybrid)
description: Job Description We are seeking a Frontend Developer with strong expertise in Vue.js and solid knowledge of WebRTC technologies . The ideal candidate will have experience developing secure, real-time web applications—preferably in online exam systems or security-focused platforms. Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain secure Single Page Applications (SPA) using Vue.js Implement real-time communication features with WebRTC Build and manage frontend-based monitoring and proctoring features Integrate authentication and identity verification systems Ensure browser security controls (tab switching detection, full-screen enforcement, copy/paste blocking, etc.) Optimize performance, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility Requirements Strong experience with Vue.js Good understanding of WebRTC Experience building Single Page Applications (SPA) (Angular / React knowledge is a plus) Ability to implement frontend security and monitoring features such as: Video, audio, and screen recording Browser tab and full-screen control Copy/paste and right-click restrictions Web traffic monitoring Secondary camera and screen detection Identity verification Virtual machine detection If you are passionate about building secure and real-time web applications, we would love to hear from you! Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We consider applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnic origin, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special attention will be given to candidates with disabilities.

title: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER
description: SENIOR FULL STACK DEVELOPER İş Tanımı Şirketimiz bünyesinde geliştirilen araç takip, IoT ve veri odaklı yazılım projelerinde görev alacak; projelerin frontend ve backend bileşenlerinin geliştirilmesinde aktif rol alacak Senior Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyon; mevcut uygulamaların sürdürülebilirliğini sağlamak, yeni özellikler geliştirmek, performans ve güvenlik iyileştirmeleri yapmak ve projelerin uçtan uca yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine katkıda bulunmak üzere kurgulanmıştır. Adaydan; takım çalışmasına yatkın, analitik düşünebilen, gerçek zamanlı veri işleyen sistemler, IoT entegrasyonları ve yapay zeka destekli uygulamalar üzerinde aktif rol alması beklenmektedir. Senden Neler Bekliyoruz? Senior Full Stack Developer olarak en az 5 yıl profesyonel deneyim Frontend tarafında: HTML, CSS React (tercihen Next.js) ile uygulama geliştirme deneyimi Backend tarafında: C# / .NET Core ile API ve servis geliştirme tecrübesi RESTful API tasarımı ve entegrasyonu konusunda deneyim Veritabanları: MsSQL veya PostgreSQL (tercihen her ikisi) NoSQL sistemler (MongoDB vb.) hakkında temel bilgi Git ve benzeri versiyon kontrol sistemleriyle çalışma deneyimi Gerçek zamanlı veri akışı ve stream tabanlı sistemlerle (WebSocket, MQTT, benzeri) çalışma deneyimi Araç takip sistemleri, IoT projeleri veya telemetri tabanlı uygulamalar üzerinde geliştirme veya entegrasyon tecrübesi Verilerin dashboard, grafik veya rapor formatlarında görselleştirilmesi konusunda deneyim Temel sunucu, ağ ve bulut altyapısı bilgisi (tercihen AWS) Analitik düşünme yeteneği, problem çözme becerisi ve ekip çalışmasına yatkınlık Tercih Sebebi Olabilecek Ek Yetenekler: Docker, Kubernetes gibi konteyner teknolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi CI/CD süreçleri ve DevOps araçları hakkında bilgi Yapay zeka tabanlı uygulamaların backend entegrasyonlarında görev almış olmak Mobil uygulama geliştirme veya entegrasyon deneyimi UX/UI prensiplerine aşinalık Agile/Scrum araçları (Trello vb.) ile çalışma deneyimi

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are a global modest fashion e-commerce company. We are currently operating in more than 130 countries and providing the content in five languages: Turkish, Arabic, English, French, German by adapting to their local preferences. We bring fashion and technology together with iconic brand and smart operations to create great value for our customers. We invest in each and every customer's experience. We strongly believe in putting people first – our customers, our teams, our partners. We are looking for new talents to join our Technology team as a Full Stack Developer . Are you a technology enthusiast and looking for a new challenge and likes to work within a dynamic, exciting, innovative, scaling up working environment? You might be the one for us. What we expect from you: • Work across the full stack — frontend, backend, admin panel, and external integrations. You'll learn fast by doing a lot. • Spot and automate manual backoffice workflows that are slowing operations down. • Get involved beyond code — understand order flows, inventory, promotions, and over time drive small projects forward on your own. • Contribute to modernizing our high-traffic platform by breaking legacy systems into micro-services. • Ship well-tested, reliable software using continuous delivery practices. What we are looking for: Mindset (This matters most) • Curious, self-driven, and eager to be mentored by experienced engineers. • A problem-solver who digs in when things break, not someone who waits for instructions. • Thinks like a product person, not just a coder — you care about the end result. Technical Fundamentals • 3–5 years of experience in software development. • Comfortable working on both frontend and backend. • Solid CS fundamentals: data structures, algorithms, databases, networking. • Experience with at least one modern backend language and one frontend framework. Go, Vue.js, Java, and PHP are a plus, but learning ability matters more. • Strong understanding of REST APIs, Git, Linux, and testing practices. Nice to have • Any exposure to e-commerce platforms or ERP systems. • Interest in mobile development, CI/CD, Docker, or distributed systems. What we offer: • A real growth path with mentorship from experienced engineers. • Access to AI-powered tools and freedom to experiment with emerging technologies. • An autonomous, open-minded team culture where your contributions are visible. • Impact on a platform used by millions across 130+ countries.

title: Backend Developer
description: Bilyoner: Where the Future of Sports Meets Innovation 🚀 As Turkey’s first legal online sports and gaming platform, we bring together technology, excitement, and the spirit of play. With the responsibility of being a pioneer, we reach millions while staying true to our core values of ethics, transparency, and responsibility. What truly sets us apart is our passion. Our team believes in moving “one step beyond” — creating meaningful, unforgettable experiences for our users and constantly reimagining what’s possible. Fueled by curiosity and innovation, we became the first platform in our sector to actively integrate artificial intelligence. Through AI-powered systems, we offer personalized journeys while ensuring a secure and responsible gaming environment. As we shape the future of sports and entertainment, our greatest strength remains our people, our partners, and our loyal community. If you feel the same excitement, your jersey is ready. 👕 🔍What We’re Looking For BS or MS in Computer, Electrical and Electronics or Mathematical Engineering or related fields 6-10 years of experience as a backend and/or full-stack development of Java backend systems and relevant Web Interfaces Strong understanding of object-oriented development Familiarity with relational and non-relational databases, key-value stores and search engines (RDBMS, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch etc.) Eager to work on cloud and auto scalable high performance solutions Eager and experience in writing unit tests and peer code reviews Design and create services and system architecture for your projects, and contribute and provide feedback to other team members Preparation of deployment and test-case documents Interest or experience in integrating LLM-based capabilities into backend systems Basic understanding of AI agent concepts A people-first, values-driven working style aligned with ethics & integrity, passion & ownership, fairness & equality, innovation and collaboration. 🎯What you’ll do? Proficiency with Java and Spring Framework (Boot, MVC, Data, Cloud, Security) Experience with Service-oriented architecture, microservices and REST APIs Comprehensive SQL and basic PL/SQL knowledge Familiarity with Docker and/or Kubernetes Experience with any of the following Kafka, Redis, Elasticsearch, Mongo, Cassandra At least basic Linux knowledge. Satisfied only with a clean and beautiful solution, Create high quality, easily readable code, Generate and pursue innovative ideas about his/her daily activities. Pushes himself and the team on every iteration to produce zero defects, Develops not only the expected, but also the untold for the sake of the user experience and comfort, Energetic, Self-Motivated, and Self-Everything. Aydınlatma Metni https://www.bilyoner.com/platform-aydinlatma-metni

title: Java Backend Engineer
description: OREDATA is a Digital Transformation & IT Consulting firm with 10+ years of proven expertise and hundreds of successfully implemented projects across the EMEA region. When you join the OREDATA team, you'll be working hand-in-hand with experts focused on tackling digital, operational, analytical & data science challenges with the greatest impact. We foster collaboration with proximity, an agile and autonomous approach and best practices and guiding principles. Read more: https://medium.com/@oredata-engineering Apply and be part of our exciting journey! Requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field Minimum 3 years of professional experience in backend software development Strong hands-on experience with Java and backend development Experience working on high-load or high-transaction systems (high traffic, scalable systems) Knowledge of multithreading and concurrent programming Experience in performance optimization (latency reduction, system tuning) Knowledge of memory management and JVM internals (heap, garbage collection) Hands-on experience in REST API design and development Experience working with SQL or NoSQL databases Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and SOLID principles Experience with debugging and performance troubleshooting Ability to write clean, maintainable, and scalable code Advanced level of English (reading and technical documentation) Get to know us If you want to know more about us and what we do, then visit our website: www.oredata.com Why Oredata? Remote working and flexible time off Open communication, flexibility and start-up spirit Learning & Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth Opportunity to get company paid Professional Certificates (Google Cloud Platform, Confluent Kafka, etc) Access to Online Training Platforms (Udemy, Pluralsight, A Cloud Guru, Coursera, etc.) Dynamic work ecosystem where you can take initiative and responsibility Opportunity to work on international projects Private Health Insurance Birthday Leave Policy Kişisel verileriniz işe alım sürecinin yürütülebilmesi amacıyla veri sorumlusu sıfatıyla şirketimiz Oredata Yazılım A.Ş. tarafından işlenecektir. Kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi ve haklarınızla ilgili detaylı bilgiye https://oredata.com/personal-data-protection-policy/ bağlantısı üzerinden ulaşabilirsiniz.

title: Engineering Manager, SAP CAP Node.js
description: We are seeking an experienced Engineering Manager with a strong background in SAP CAP and Node.js to lead our engineering team. This role involves overseeing technical projects, fostering collaboration, and driving innovation while maintaining industry best practices. Responsibilities Conduct code reviews and ensure features adhere to clean code and design principles Monitor applications, troubleshoot issues, and resolve bugs to maintain system integrity Write comprehensive technical and user documentation Collaborate with the team to track performance and address needs effectively Engage with customers and stakeholders to address technical topics and provide metrics to management Participate in the setup, improvement, and execution of development processes Provide architectural and design decisions to guide technical implementations Requirements 7+ years of experience in SAPUI5, BTP, HANA, CAP, Node.js, CI/CD (Jenkins, Piper, Webdriver.io), with a broad technological perspective Proven experience leading teams of 10+ people with a focus on cloud technologies, SAP, architecture, and organizational mentoring Proficiency in design principles and microservice architecture Familiarity with Agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban Basic understanding of JavaScript and Node.js Knowledge of SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), HANA database, and SAP CAP (Java and Node.js) English proficiency at B2 level or higher We offer International projects with top brands Work with global teams of highly skilled, diverse peers Healthcare benefits Employee financial programs Paid time off and sick leave Upskilling, reskilling and certification courses Unlimited access to the LinkedIn Learning library and 22,000+ courses Global career opportunities Volunteer and community involvement opportunities EPAM Employee Groups Award-winning culture recognized by Glassdoor, Newsweek and LinkedIn

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Salihli’de bulunan fabrikamızda görev alacak, dijital dönüşüm ve yazılım geliştirme süreçlerimize katkı sağlayacak Full Stack Developer ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Görev Tanımı • Şirket içi web tabanlı yazılım projelerinin geliştirilmesi • Frontend ve backend süreçlerinde aktif rol alınması • Mevcut sistemlerin iyileştirilmesi ve yeni modüllerin geliştirilmesi • Veri tabanı, API ve entegrasyon süreçlerinin yönetilmesi • Üretim, operasyon ve yönetim ekiplerinin ihtiyaçlarına yönelik yazılım çözümleri geliştirilmesi • Yazılım performansı, güvenliği ve sürdürülebilirliğinin sağlanması Aradığımız Nitelikler • Full stack yazılım geliştirme konusunda deneyim sahibi • JavaScript / TypeScript bilgisine sahip • React, Vue veya Angular gibi frontend teknolojilerinden en az birinde tecrübeli • Node.js, .NET, Java, Python veya benzeri backend teknolojilerinden biriyle çalışmış • SQL ve/veya NoSQL veri tabanları konusunda bilgi sahibi • RESTful API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerine hâkim • Git kullanımında deneyimli • Analitik düşünen, çözüm odaklı ve takım çalışmasına yatkın Tercihen • ERP, üretim takip, stok, depo veya benzeri kurumsal yazılım süreçlerinde deneyim • Docker, CI/CD veya cloud servisleri hakkında bilgi • Endüstriyel üretim süreçlerine ilgi duymak

title: .NET Developer (Backend-Focused)
description: Location data is not just a pin on a map. It’s about reaching the right place, with the right information, at the right time, and being able to trust it. Yet in critical moments, when accuracy matters most, we still encounter incomplete, outdated, or incorrect location data. This is where Truemap begins. At Truemap, we build technology that enables leading brands to manage and optimize their location data across platforms like Google, Apple, and other map services. We are transforming a traditionally manual and fragmented process into a scalable, automated, and reliable SaaS product. What We’re Looking For Strong backend development experience with .NET Core (min. 3 years) Experience integrating with external APIs (REST, JSON-based services) Solid understanding of HTTP, authentication (OAuth, JWT), and API flows Experience working with relational databases (SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL) Ability to build simple admin panels using basic frontend technologies (Razor, React, or similar) Strong understanding of object-oriented programming (OOP) principles Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-structured code Ability to work independently and take ownership What You’ll Do Build backend services that integrate with external platforms Design and manage location data across multiple systems Develop features to sync and update large-scale location data Build simple internal tools and admin panels Help turn manual workflows into automated systems Challenges You’ll Work On Handling inconsistent or incomplete location data Syncing data across multiple platforms Building reliable systems on top of third-party APIs We don’t expect you to check every box. If you’re strong in backend development and comfortable working with APIs, you’ll do great here. We care about clean code and strong engineering fundamentals, not just code that works.
